meta.title: Midjourney 提示词模板库
meta.description: 可直接复制使用的 Midjourney 提示词模板，覆盖 V7/V8 全版本
meta.usage: 将 prompt 字段的内容直接粘贴到 Midjourney 中使用，根据需要替换 [方括号] 中的占位符

templates.name: 电影级人像
templates.description: 适用于高质量写实人像，V8 表现最佳
templates.prompt: A cinematic portrait of [人物描述, e.g., a weathered fisherman with deep wrinkles], shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm f/1.4 lens, [光照, e.g., golden hour side lighting], shallow depth of field, film grain, [色调, e.g., warm amber tones] --ar 2:3 --v 8 --s 250 --raw

templates.name: 风景摄影
templates.prompt: A breathtaking [场景, e.g., mountain landscape at sunrise], captured with Sony A7R V, 24mm wide angle lens, [天气/氛围, e.g., misty morning with golden light rays], hyper-detailed, 8K resolution, National Geographic style --ar 16:9 --v 8 --s 200 --hd

templates.name: 产品摄影
templates.prompt: Professional product photography of [产品, e.g., a luxury perfume bottle], on [背景, e.g., a marble surface with soft shadows], studio lighting with [光效, e.g., dramatic rim light and soft fill], commercial quality, 4K, clean composition --ar 4:5 --v 8 --s 100 --raw

templates.name: 街头纪实
templates.prompt: Street photography of [场景, e.g., a rainy Tokyo alley at night], shot on Leica M11, 35mm f/1.4, [氛围, e.g., neon reflections on wet pavement], candid moment, documentary style, slight film grain --ar 3:2 --v 8 --s 150 --raw

templates.name: 角色概念设计
templates.prompt: [角色描述, e.g., A cyberpunk samurai with neon-lit armor], character concept art, full body, [视角, e.g., dynamic three-quarter view], detailed costume design, [风格, e.g., Artstation trending, Wlop style], intricate details, dramatic lighting --ar 2:3 --v 7 --s 500

templates.name: 环境概念设计
templates.prompt: Epic [环境, e.g., floating sky city above the clouds], environment concept art, [氛围, e.g., ethereal golden light piercing through mist], matte painting style, cinematic composition, ultra wide establishing shot, [艺术风格, e.g., Studio Ghibli meets Blade Runner] --ar 21:9 --v 7 --s 600

templates.name: 生物设计
templates.prompt: Creature design of [生物, e.g., an ancient forest guardian made of living wood and moss], [视角, e.g., front and side view turnaround], biological plausibility, [细节, e.g., bioluminescent markings], concept art sheet, white background --ar 16:9 --v 7 --s 400

templates.name: 海报设计
templates.description: 活动/电影海报，V8 文字渲染增强
templates.prompt: A [风格, e.g., minimalist Japanese] poster design for [主题, e.g., a jazz music festival], featuring "[标题文字, e.g., TOKYO JAZZ 2026]" in [字体风格, e.g., bold sans-serif typography], [视觉元素, e.g., abstract saxophone silhouette with flowing musical notes], [配色, e.g., deep navy and gold color scheme] --ar 2:3 --v 8 --s 300

templates.name: Logo 概念
templates.prompt: Minimalist logo design for [品牌, e.g., a premium tea brand called 'Zenleaf'], [风格, e.g., clean geometric mark combining a leaf and zen circle], [配色, e.g., forest green on white], vector style, professional branding, simple and memorable --ar 1:1 --v 8 --s 200

templates.name: 社交媒体图
templates.prompt: [风格, e.g., Aesthetic flat lay] of [内容, e.g., a cozy reading setup with coffee, books, and autumn leaves], [色调, e.g., warm mocha and cream tones], Instagram-worthy composition, soft natural light from above, lifestyle photography --ar 1:1 --v 8 --s 200

templates.name: 无缝纹理
templates.prompt: Seamless [类型, e.g., watercolor floral] pattern, [描述, e.g., delicate cherry blossoms and leaves], [配色, e.g., soft pink and sage green on cream background], repeating tile, textile design quality --ar 1:1 --v 7 --tile

templates.name: 材质纹理
templates.prompt: Highly detailed [材质, e.g., aged leather] texture, [细节, e.g., with natural cracks, scratches, and patina], top-down view, even lighting, PBR material reference, 4K resolution --ar 1:1 --v 8 --raw

templates.name: 个性化驱动生成
templates.description: 利用 V8 个性化配置的最佳实践
templates.prompt: [详细场景描述, e.g., A solitary lighthouse on a rocky cliff during a violent thunderstorm, massive waves crashing against the rocks, lightning illuminating the dark sky, rain-soaked stone path leading to the lighthouse door] --v 8 --s 1000 --p --hd
templates.notes: V8 在 --stylize 1000 配合个性化配置时表现最佳，提示词应更长更具体

templates.name: 风格参考组合
templates.description: 使用多重风格参考保持一致性
templates.prompt: [内容描述, e.g., A cozy bookshop interior with warm lighting and floor-to-ceiling shelves] --v 8 --sref [风格参考URL1] [风格参考URL2] --sw 300 --s 500 --hd
templates.notes: V8.1 中 Moodboards 和 srefs 变得超级稳定

templates.name: 精确文字渲染
templates.description: V8 增强的文字渲染能力
templates.prompt: [场景描述, e.g., A vintage neon sign on a brick wall] with the text "[文字内容, e.g., OPEN 24 HOURS]" in [字体风格, e.g., glowing red neon tubes], [环境, e.g., rainy night, reflections on wet sidewalk] --v 8 --s 200 --hd
templates.notes: V8 中将文字放入引号可显著提升渲染准确性

templates.name: 复杂多主体构图
templates.description: V8 增强的复杂场景理解能力
templates.prompt: [详细多主体场景, e.g., In a bustling medieval marketplace, a young woman in a red cloak examines a golden apple at a fruit vendor's stall, while behind her a hooded thief reaches for her coin purse, and in the background a knight on horseback rides through the crowd] --v 8 --s 400 --hd --ar 16:9
templates.notes: V8 在解析多子句长提示词时结构连贯性显著提升

templates.name: RAW 写实摄影
templates.prompt: [摄影场景, e.g., An elderly Japanese craftsman carefully shaping a ceramic bowl in his traditional workshop], documentary photography, natural available light, [镜头, e.g., shot on Fujifilm X-T5, 56mm f/1.2], authentic and unposed, subtle film emulation --v 8 --raw --s 100 --hd
templates.notes: V8 官方推荐使用 --raw 获得更朴素可控的写实效果

parameter_presets.description: 常用参数预设组合，可直接附加到任何提示词末尾

presets.name: V8 最高质量
presets.description: V8 最高质量输出，适用于最终成品

presets.name: V8 快速探索
presets.description: V8.1 标准分辨率快速迭代，速度等同 V7 draft

presets.name: V8 个性化最佳
presets.description: V8 推荐的个性化驱动工作流

presets.name: V7 创意探索
presets.description: V7 高风格化+适度混沌，适合创意探索

presets.name: V7 一致性输出
presets.description: V7 低风格化+全能参考，保持角色/物品一致

presets.name: 极致写实
presets.description: 最接近真实摄影的输出，适合产品和人像

presets.name: 艺术风格化
presets.description: 高度艺术化输出，适合插画和概念艺术
